requirements.title: packages/ui/tokens.schema.json validates DTCG-format-compatible structure (shape-only)
requirements.level_notes: Schema-level structural contract: import-time `InvariantsSchema.parse(raw)` (which hashes + shape-validates the registered `sourcePath` via `packages/keel-invariants/src/invariants.manifest.ts`) is the load-bearing complement; CR adversarial pass (Blind Hunter) per § Testing Standards is the agreed backstop for the schema-keyword correctness / draft-2020-12 compliance claims.
substrate_verification: File exists on disk: packages/ui/tokens.schema.json (19866 bytes)
Schema declares `$schema: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema` — DTCG-compatible draft-2020-12 contract
Eight required root semantic groups present (color, type, font, space, radius, motion, density, breakpoint)
`additionalProperties: false` at every level — duplicate/misspelled keys fail validation
Per-`$type` leaf defs (leafColor, leafDimension, leafDuration, leafNumber, leafFontFamily, leafFontWeight, leafCubicBezier) each `const` their `$type` and regex-validate `$value`
Alias pattern `^(\{[a-z][a-z0-9]*(\.[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*)+\}|[^{}]+)$` enforces literal-or-{alias} form
Optional `$modes` overlay keyed by light|dark|high-contrast with sparse-group defs
`pnpm -w typecheck` ✓ (16 tasks) — compiles consumer packages that reference the schema indirectly via manifest hashing
`pnpm keel-invariants:check` clean-path ✓ exit 0 — schema file's sha256 matches manifest `INV-tokens-schema-contract.contentHash` (abb5bc4c...e07ac)
